name: Glade Chairlift Soap Render
description: Render night chairlift with tiny dramas on each chair
code: (function(){var c=drawingContext,w=dimensionContext.width,h=dimensionContext.height,t=state.t||0;c.fillStyle='rgba(5,10,20,1)';c.fillRect(0,0,w,h);var g=c.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,h);g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(10,30,70,1)');g.addColorStop(0.6,'rgba(6,12,30,1)');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(230,235,245,1)');c.fillStyle=g;c.fillRect(0,0,w,h);c.fillStyle='rgba(230,235,245,1)';c.fillRect(0,h*0.7,w,h*0.3);c.save();c.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.9)';for(var i=0;i<90;i++){var sx=(i*79+t*0.25)%w,sy=(i*41)% (h*0.7);c.fillRect(sx,sy,1,1);}c.restore();c.strokeStyle='rgba(180,210,240,0.8)';c.lineWidth=3;c.beginPath();c.moveTo(0,h*0.25);c.lineTo(w,h*0.15);c.stroke();c.beginPath();c.moveTo(0,h*0.4);c.lineTo(w,h*0.3);c.stroke();function lerp(a,b,u){return a+(b-a)*u;}function pathPoint(u,row){var y0=row===0?h*0.25:h*0.4,y1=row===0?h*0.15:h*0.3;return {x:lerp(0,w,u),y:lerp(y0,y1,u)};}var chairs=state.chairs||[];for(var i=0;i<chairs.length;i++){var ch=chairs[i];var row=i%2;var p=pathPoint(ch.u,row);c.save();c.translate(p.x,p.y);c.strokeStyle='rgba(180,210,240,0.9)';c.lineWidth=2;c.beginPath();c.moveTo(0,-18);c.lineTo(0,0);c.stroke();c.strokeRect(-10,0,20,12);function person(dx,col,pose){c.save();c.translate(dx,0);c.fillStyle=col;c.beginPath();c.arc(0,-7,3,0,Math.PI*2);c.fill();c.strokeStyle=col;c.lineWidth=1.6;c.beginPath();if(pose===0){c.moveTo(0,-4);c.lineTo(0,4);c.moveTo(0,-2);c.lineTo(-4,2);c.moveTo(0,-2);c.lineTo(4,2);}else if(pose===1){c.moveTo(0,-4);c.lineTo(0,3);c.moveTo(0,-1);c.lineTo(4,-6);}else if(pose===2){c.moveTo(-1,-4);c.lineTo(-1,4);c.moveTo(1,-4);c.lineTo(1,4);}else{c.moveTo(0,-4);c.lineTo(0,4);c.moveTo(0,-2);c.lineTo(-4,-6);}c.stroke();c.restore();}if(ch.scene===0){person(-4,'rgba(230,220,255,0.95)',0);person(4,'rgba(200,255,220,0.95)',0);}else if(ch.scene===1){person(-4,'rgba(255,210,190,0.95)',1);person(4,'rgba(190,220,255,0.95)',3);}else if(ch.scene===2){person(-4,'rgba(220,240,255,0.95)',2);}else{person(-4,'rgba(255,230,190,0.95)',0);person(4,'rgba(255,230,190,0.6)',0);}c.restore();}c.save();c.globalCompositeOperation='screen';for(var j=0;j<16;j++){var bx=(j*137+t*0.4)%w,by=h*0.4+Math.sin(t*0.03+j)*20;var r=4+(j%3)*3;var cg=c.createRadialGradient(bx,by,0,bx,by,r);cg.addColorStop(0,'rgba(180,255,240,0.9)');cg.addColorStop(1,'rgba(180,255,240,0)');c.fillStyle=cg;c.beginPath();c.arc(bx,by,r,0,Math.PI*2);c.fill();}c.restore();})();
